Alex
Alex experiences frustration and is observant of the dynamics among other characters.

Taylor
Taylor has authoritarian certainty, shows reverence towards a device, and has a change in perspective.

Jordan
Jordan shares a commitment to discovery and has an interaction with Taylor regarding a device.

Cruz
Cruz has a narrowing vision of control and order.

tech
A device that Taylor believes could change the game if understood.

HU YIFAN
HU YIFAN is a 25 - year - old female majoring in computer science with a minor in Mathematics. She has extensive experience in AI start - ups, various technical roles, and educational background from the University of Sydney. She is proficient in multiple languages and has skills in coding and multidisciplinary knowledge.

SUZHOU start - up
A start - up where HU YIFAN collected EEG, EMG to develop products based on designed chips and algorithms.

Yovole Network SHANGHAI
An organization where HU YIFAN was involved in cloud computing and internet data center tasks such as cloud platform monitoring and microservices platform maintenance.

SHANGHAI
A geographical location where Yovole Network is based.

University of Sydney
The educational institution where HU YIFAN obtained a Bachelor of science in computer science with a minor in Math from 2020.8 - 2024.6.

SUZHOU
A geographical location where a start - up is located where HU YIFAN gained experience.

AI start - up
A category representing start - up companies in the field of artificial intelligence, where HU YIFAN has gained experience.
